pois.name: Seward Cruise Ship Dock
pois.notes: Direct dock at the south end of town. Walking distance to downtown and SeaLife Center.

pois.name: Alaska SeaLife Center
pois.notes: Marine wildlife research and rehabilitation facility. Puffins, sea lions, and touch tanks.

pois.name: Kenai Fjords National Park
pois.notes: Tidewater glaciers, humpback whales, puffin colonies. Day cruises depart from Seward harbor.

pois.name: Exit Glacier
pois.notes: Only road-accessible glacier in the park. Multiple trail options from easy to strenuous.

pois.name: Resurrection Bay
pois.notes: Deep protected fjord surrounded by mountains. Kayaking, fishing, and wildlife viewing.

pois.name: Downtown Seward
pois.notes: Historic small town with shops, restaurants, galleries. Iditarod trailhead.

pois.name: Seward Small Boat Harbor
pois.notes: Active fishing harbor. Charter fishing, kayak tours, and Kenai Fjords boat tours depart here.

pois.name: Seward Waterfront Park
pois.notes: Scenic waterfront trail connecting cruise dock to downtown.

pois.name: Seward Military Resort
pois.notes: Former WWII military base with small history museum.

pois.name: Iditarod National Historic Trail
pois.notes: Mile 0 of the famous Iditarod Trail. Marker in downtown Seward.
